validate.notes: BLOCKED 2026-04-25: cannot revalidate. (1) Bash tool fails on every invocation with 'EACCES: permission denied, mkdir /home/worker/.claude/session-env' before any command runs - harness-level setup issue, dangerouslyDisableSandbox does not help. So docker build / NOP test / gold test / judge.py cannot be executed. (2) Current task state would fail gold test anyway: solve.sh references /solution/patch.diff but that file does not exist in /workspace/task/solution/ (only solve.sh is present). The previous validate node (kimi-k2p5-turbo run) reported pass with patch.diff in place, so the file appears to have been removed between runs. (3) Cannot regenerate patch.diff: /workspace/task/solution/ and /workspace/task/tests/ are read-only - Write and Edit both return EACCES. Only /workspace/task/status.json (this file) is writable. The diff content for PR denoland/deno#32022 was successfully fetched from the GitHub API (Cargo.toml, cli/tsc/README.md, docs/tsgo.md deletion, tools/lint.js plus 6 pure renames under bench_util/->tests/bench_util/) and is ready to be written, but the filesystem permissions prevent it. Recovery requires either restoring write perms on solution/ or running with a working bash so docker can be invoked.
